energy_toast_low: We'll keep things gentle — no pressure.
energy_toast_high: Great energy — we'll nudge you to finish open loops.
brain_dump_hint: Write anything. Enter saves a line and clears. No categories needed.
wip_mirror_body: You've touched {{count}} different tasks in the last 30 minutes. Is this the pace you want?
lock_exit_reason: A few words on why (helps future you)
lock_exit_encourage: You've been at this for ~{{minutes}} min — that counts. Pick one reason or write a line.
lock_exit_encourage_low: Stopping when energy is low is wise. Pick a reason or write one line to leave.
lock_exit_pick_reason: What fits best? (one tap to leave)
lock_exit_quick_split: Task needs to be broken down
lock_exit_quick_unsure: Not sure — stepping away for now
